headline: Uber Taps Zoox Robotaxis To Test Autonomous Economics In Key Cities
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is partnering with Amazon owned Zoox to bring purpose built robotaxis onto the Uber app. Zoox vehicles will be offered to Uber riders for the first time outside Zoox’s own app. The initial rollout is planned for Las Vegas and Los Angeles, ahead of a broader potential deployment on Uber’s platform. For Uber, this move fits directly into its core ride hailing and mobility business, where autonomous driving has been a long term focus across the industry. Large...

headline: Amazon’s New Bets In Ultrafast Delivery AI Shopping And Robotaxis
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has launched "Amazon Now" 15 minute delivery in Brazil, entering ultrafast grocery and convenience delivery in Latin America’s largest e commerce market. In the US, Amazon is rolling out more direct to consumer features, including AI assisted "Buy for Me" shopping and expanded third party integrations for merchants. The company also secured a legal decision limiting the use of external AI bots on its marketplace, affecting how outside tools can access Amazon...

headline: US applications for unemployment benefits inch down to 213,000 as layoffs remain stable
summary: U.S. applications for unemployment benefits inched down modestly last week as layoffs remain at historically healthy levels despite a weakening job market.  The number of Americans filing for jobless aid for the week ending March 7 fell by 1,000 to 213,000 the previous week, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Analysts surveyed by the data firm FactSet forecast 215,000 new benefit applications.

content.title: US applications for unemployment benefits inch down to 213,000 as layoffs remain stable
content.summary: U.S. applications for unemployment benefits inched down modestly last week as layoffs remain at historically healthy levels despite a weakening job market.  The number of Americans filing for jobless aid for the week ending March 7 fell by 1,000 to 213,000 the previous week, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Analysts surveyed by the data firm FactSet forecast 215,000 new benefit applications.

headline: Exclusive-Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, four execs over alleged $1.4 billion tax evasion
summary: Milan prosecutors have requested trial for Amazon's European unit and four of its managers over alleged tax evasion worth around 1.2 billion euros ($1.38 billion), two ‌sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Thursday.  The move is unprecedented for a case ‌of this kind in Italy, as Amazon agreed in December to pay 527 million euros, including interest, to Italy's Revenue Agency to settle ​the tax dispute.

content.title: Exclusive-Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, four execs over alleged $1.4 billion tax evasion
content.summary: Milan prosecutors have requested trial for Amazon's European unit and four of its managers over alleged tax evasion worth around 1.2 billion euros ($1.38 billion), two ‌sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Thursday.  The move is unprecedented for a case ‌of this kind in Italy, as Amazon agreed in December to pay 527 million euros, including interest, to Italy's Revenue Agency to settle ​the tax dispute.

headline: Ondas Stock Gains On Multi-Year Israel Land Clearance Project
summary: Ondas Inc. shares are up on Tuesday. The company announced Tuesday that it received an initial order valued at around $15.8 million for a national demining program. This news comes as broader markets experienced slight declines, with the S&P 500...

headline: Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon over tax evasion
summary: Milan prosecutors have requested a criminal trial for Amazon and four of its executives over alleged tax fraud worth more than one billion euros, Italian media reported Thursday.Amazon did not disclose the amount, but Italian media said it paid more than 500 million euros ($575 million) to settle the dispute.

content.title: Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon over tax evasion
content.summary: Milan prosecutors have requested a criminal trial for Amazon and four of its executives over alleged tax fraud worth more than one billion euros, Italian media reported Thursday.Amazon did not disclose the amount, but Italian media said it paid more than 500 million euros ($575 million) to settle the dispute.

thumbnail.caption: Amazon said it would contest the case, calling it unfounded and stressing it is among the top 50 taxpayers in Italy (INA FASSBENDER)

headline: Amazon faces possible trial in Italy over alleged tax evasion
summary: Prosecutors say online marketplace may have enabled billions in unpaid VAT.

content.title: Amazon faces possible trial in Italy over alleged tax evasion
content.summary: Prosecutors say online marketplace may have enabled billions in unpaid VAT.

headline: S&P Weighs Rule Changes That Would Speed SpaceX’s S&P 500 Entry
summary: Funds that track the index must buy newly added stocks, and roughly $24 trillion is tied to the S&P 500, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.  Any change to the S&P 500’s rules would be momentous.  A spokesperson for SpaceX didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.

content.title: S&P Weighs Rule Changes That Would Speed SpaceX’s S&P 500 Entry
